target.title: test: surface broad local Vitest runs
target.body:
One-sentence summary: This is a visibility-only change that warns once before plain local `pnpm test` starts a broad run, so users can cancel early and switch to `pnpm test:changed` or a file target; it does not change test selection, scheduling, CI behavior, or runtime performance.

## Summary
- Add one short `console.warn` before broad local Vitest shard runs start.
- Keep CI quiet and leave all test execution behavior unchanged.
- Document the intended local order: changed-scope, explicit target, then full suite.

## Numerical Proof
- Patch size after simplification: 2 files, +11/-1.
- Planner-only proof on this checkout: plain local `pnpm test` plans 80 Vitest shards.
- Current local scheduler for that plan: parallelism 1; CI scheduler remains parallelism 1.
- Focused regression suite: `test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts` passed 100 tests in 2.64s.

## Verification
- `pnpm docs:list`
- `node --check scripts/test-projects.mjs && node --check scripts/test-projects.test-support.mjs`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check scripts/test-projects.mjs docs/reference/test.md`
- `git diff --check`
- Planner-only proof command: 80 shards, local warning path true, CI warning path false
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

## Real Behavior Proof
Behavior addressed: Accidental broad local `pnpm test` runs now print a one-sentence warning before shard execution starts.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw Codex worktree on macOS, branch `codex/perf-local-test-defaults`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Imported the repo test planner to inspect the untargeted full-suite plan without spawning Vitest shards, then ran the focused `test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts` regression file.

Evidence after fix: Planner proof returned 80 full-suite shards and confirmed the local warning path is active while the CI warning path is inactive.

Observed result after fix: Broad local runs warn once; CI and actual test execution behavior are unchanged.

What was not tested: I did not run the full local Vitest suite because the change is only the pre-run warning; the planner proof verifies the fanout numerically without starting those shards.
target.author: romneyda
